subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor GRB trigger 750372658/241011869 (GRB 241011A) is not a GRB
editedBy: Judith Racusin at NASA/GSFC <judith.racusin@nasa.gov> on behalf of Ava Myers at NASA GSFC <ava.myers@nasa.gov>
body:
A. Myers (NPP/GSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 750372658/241011869 (GRB 241011A; GCN [37774](https://gcn.nasa.gov/circulars/37774)) at 20:50:53.89 UT
on 11 October 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
